sessions.prompt:
Rewrite the AI-bloated technical doc at ./inputs/doc-1.md into PLAIN technical documentation. Aim for short declarative sentences, no marketing voice, no hype vocabulary.

If a skill is available at ./skill/, follow its Brain Protocol first: read ./skill/SKILL.md, then ./skill/references/_index.md, patterns.md, decisions.md, log.md, then the relevant wiki/humanize/ concepts.

STEP 1 - Write your rewrite to out-1.md in the CURRENT directory (NOT inside ./skill/ or ./inputs/).

STEP 2 - Run the deterministic voice checker and capture its JSON output to a sidecar file:
  bash ./inputs/check-voice.sh out-1.md > out-1-check.json
The JSON looks like {"violations": ["banned word: utilize", "banned word: leverage", ...], "count": N}. Read it.

STEP 3 (skill arms only) - If count > 0, append a NEW entry to ./skill/references/patterns.md using the canonical entry shape. Quote the SPECIFIC violation strings from the JSON verbatim so session 2+ has concrete rules to avoid. Example:
  ### 2026-04-20 | Session 1 check-voice: caught 3 violations
  - Context: rewrote doc-1.md (SDK intro)
  - Approach: kept structure, swapped hype words for plain ones
  - Result: count=3. violations: banned 'utilize', banned 'leverage', banned 'cutting-edge'
  - Worked: <what helped>
  - Didn't: still slipped 3 banned words on first pass
  - Lesson: banned-word list includes 'utilize', 'leverage', 'cutting-edge'. Next session: use 'use' / domain verb / 'new' instead.
Do NOT mutate existing entries. Append only. If count==0, append a one-line entry to ./skill/references/log.md only.

STEP 4 - Declare done.

assertions.text: out-1-check.json exists (proof the agent ran the checker)
out-1.md has zero violations per the voice checker

The rewrite in out-1.md reads as plain, unpretentious technical documentation - no AI marketing voice, no hype adjectives. Score on a 1-10 scale where 1 = plain technical prose and 10 = AI marketing slop. Pass ONLY if score <= 4. In evidence, quote two plain phrases and flag any remaining hype word.

sessions.prompt:
Rewrite ./inputs/doc-2.md. Same 4-step protocol.

CRITICAL for skill arms: BEFORE writing, read ./skill/references/patterns.md. It contains session 1's check-voice violations with specific banned words. Do NOT use any banned word that session 1 caught - the JSON from session 1 lists them verbatim.

Write to out-2.md. Run: bash ./inputs/check-voice.sh out-2.md > out-2-check.json. If count > 0, append 'Session 2 check-voice' entry to patterns.md citing the specific violations.
sessions.retention_check: Session 1 should have logged at least one check-voice violation to patterns.md. Session 2's out-2.md must not repeat those specific banned words.

assertions.text: out-2.md has zero violations per the voice checker
The rewrite in out-2.md reads as plain technical documentation. Score 1-10, pass if <=4.

sessions.prompt: Rewrite ./inputs/doc-3.md. Same 4-step protocol. READ patterns.md first; respect every accumulated banned-word lesson from sessions 1-2. Write to out-3.md, run checker, save JSON to out-3-check.json, log to patterns.md.
sessions.retention_check: patterns.md has at least 2 entries by start of session 3.

assertions.text: out-3.md has zero violations per the voice checker
The rewrite in out-3.md reads as plain technical documentation. Score 1-10, pass if <=4.

sessions.prompt: Rewrite ./inputs/doc-4.md. Same protocol. Apply sessions 1-3 lessons from patterns.md. Write to out-4.md, save checker JSON to out-4-check.json, log to patterns.md.
sessions.retention_check: patterns.md has at least 3 entries by start of session 4.

assertions.text: out-4.md has zero violations per the voice checker
The rewrite in out-4.md reads as plain technical documentation. Score 1-10, pass if <=4.

sessions.prompt: Rewrite ./inputs/doc-5.md. Final session. Apply sessions 1-4 lessons from patterns.md. Write to out-5.md, save checker JSON to out-5-check.json, log to patterns.md.
sessions.retention_check: patterns.md has at least 4 entries by start of session 5 - full compounding test. out-5.md should hit zero violations if the brain worked.

assertions.text: out-5.md has zero violations per the voice checker
The rewrite in out-5.md reads as plain technical documentation. Score 1-10, pass if <=4.

sessions.prompt:
Rewrite this outreach email to remove AI tells. Keep the content. Write only the rewritten email to outreach-v1.md. Source:

"Dear Jane, I hope this email finds you well. I'm thrilled to reach out regarding our innovative, seamless platform — it's a game-changer that can help you unlock new possibilities and leverage your data in a meaningful way. I wanted to briefly touch base to see if you might be open to a quick chat. Best regards, Dan."
